modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print without entering department code each time

full_description_text: The user was trying to print documents on a Windows machine. They expressed frustration about having to input their department code repeatedly for each print job. This issue seems to be affecting their workflow during busy hours.
short_description: Unable to print without entering department code each time
description: The user was trying to print documents on a Windows machine. They expressed frustration about having to input their department code repeatedly for each print job. This issue seems to be affecting their workflow during busy hours.
